hero_prompt_inject: A premium square meal prep tray with rounded corners, a warm beige matte body, and a sealed transparent lid revealing colorful fresh food inside. A bold red wraparound label band across the lid displays the '/delicut/' brand in clean white typography alongside a white nutritional info panel. The container sits flat on a clean light surface, photographed from directly above in a minimalist studio style.

items.visual_description: Two rectangular food product labels designed for meal containers. Label 1 is a horizontal/landscape-oriented label with a clean grid layout displaying nutritional information, product name, and a barcode. Label 2 is a vertical/portrait-oriented label with rotated text layout, also carrying nutritional data and a barcode, designed to wrap around or fit on a narrower surface.
items.colors: Predominantly light grey/cream background (#F9F4ED) with black typography. No bold use of brand accent colors like Grenade red or Pumpkin orange visible. The /delicut/ logo and all text are rendered in black for high contrast on the pale background.
items.material: Paper-based adhesive label stock, likely matte finish, suitable for printing and sticking onto food containers or meal boxes.
items.branding_position: The /delicut/ wordmark appears prominently in the top-left area of both labels, styled in a bold sans-serif font with forward slashes framing the brand name.
items.label_style: Minimalist, modern typographic layout using a clean sans-serif typeface. Label 1 (60x60mm) displays: brand logo, product name (Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad), category (Snacks), meal size (Small Meal), macros (kcal, pro, carbs, fat), best before date, freshly made for name and ID, and a barcode. Label 2 (45x65mm) displays the same data types but in a rotated vertical orientation with the product name (Apple Cinnamon Muffin) running vertically in large bold type, with macros and barcode rotated 90 degrees.
items.usage_instructions: No explicit application instructions shown. Labels appear to be peel-and-stick adhesive labels applied directly to meal containers or packaging surfaces.
items.dimensions_noted: Label 1: 60mm wide x 60mm tall. Label 2: 45mm wide x 65mm tall.
items.prompt_inject: Two minimalist adhesive food labels from Delicut, a UAE healthy meal brand, printed on matte cream-white paper stock with crisp black typography. One is a square 60x60mm label laid flat showing nutritional stats and a barcode, the other a taller 45x65mm vertical label with bold rotated product name text. Both feature the /delicut/ logo prominently, sitting cleanly on a white studio surface.

items.visual_description: The page shows two types of branded tapes and two circular stickers. Standard tape appears as a horizontal strip (shown on two rounded-rectangle card mockups) with repeating brand elements. Bag tape is a wide rectangular strip featuring the Delicut logo prominently, tagline, and a QR code. Two circular stickers of 40mm diameter are shown — one in red and one in dark green — both bearing the /delicut/ wordmark in white.
items.colors: Grenade red (#FF3F1F) and Spinach green (#043F12) are the dominant colors. The standard tape uses both red and green alternating bands. The bag tape comes in two colorways — red background and green background. The circular stickers mirror these two colorways. White is used for typography across all items.
items.material: Stickers and tapes are self-adhesive printed materials — likely vinyl or coated paper stock for the stickers, and polypropylene or paper-based adhesive tape for the tapes.
items.branding_position: On the standard tape, the Delicut wordmark and delicut.ae URL repeat horizontally across the tape strip. On the bag tape, the large /delicut/ wordmark is center-left with 'gourmet everyday' tagline beside it and a QR code on the right end. On circular stickers, the /delicut/ wordmark is centered within the circle.
items.label_style: Bold sans-serif typography is used throughout. The /delicut/ wordmark uses a distinctive slash-framed format. The bag tape includes the 'gourmet everyday' secondary tagline in smaller text and a scannable QR code. The standard tape repeats the logo and URL in a ticker-style horizontal band. The stickers are minimal — logo only on a solid color circle.
items.usage_instructions: No explicit application instructions are shown on the page. The items are presented as specification references for print production.
items.dimensions_noted: Standard tape: 20mm height. Bag tape: 222mm width x 45mm height. Circular stickers: 40mm diameter (both red and green variants).
items.prompt_inject: Two small round branded stickers — one bold red, one deep forest green — each 40mm across, printed with the white /delicut/ wordmark in clean sans-serif, sitting flat on a cream surface beside a wide branded adhesive tape strip. The tape features the large /delicut/ logo in white on a vivid red background with a QR code on one end, shot in a crisp product flat-lay style.

items.visual_description: A small square-ish food tray with rounded corners, approximately 400ml capacity. The container has a clear transparent lid sealed on top, allowing the contents (a Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad with visible greens) to show through. The tray body is white/light grey opaque plastic with a compact, low-profile form factor typical of ready-meal packaging.
items.colors: The container is predominantly white/light grey. The label is white with black typography. A bold dark green (#043F12 Spinach green) band wraps around the sides of the tray as a branded sleeve or band. The Delicut logo and product information are printed in black and dark green on a white label background.
items.material: The tray appears to be made of rigid white opaque plastic (likely PP - polypropylene) with a clear transparent plastic sealed lid, suitable for fresh food storage and refrigeration.
items.branding_position: The Delicut label is applied centrally on the top lid of the tray. A dark green branded band with the Delicut logo and website (delicut.ae) also wraps around the sides of the container.
items.label_style: The label is clean and minimal with a white background. It features the '/delicut/' wordmark in bold sans-serif font, the product name 'Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad' in medium-weight sans-serif, category tag 'Snacks', meal size 'Small Meal', and a clear nutritional grid showing kcal (560), protein (29), carbs (32), and fat (36). It also includes best-before date, a barcode, batch code (1C/1D1), and a personalisation line 'Freshly Made for Javi Tortosa Mateu' with an order number. Layout is structured and utilitarian.
items.usage_instructions: No explicit application or sealing instructions are shown on this page. The label appears to be a pre-printed adhesive label applied flat to the top surface of the sealed lid.
items.dimensions_noted: A measurement of 62 mm is indicated at the top of the image, likely referring to the label width.
items.prompt_inject: A small square white plastic meal prep tray with rounded corners and a clear sealed lid, sitting on a clean surface. items.branding_position: The Delicut branding appears as a wraparound sleeve label positioned around the middle section of the tray, spanning both the tray body and partially over the lid.
